finalists.title: VP, Workspace Drive
finalists.location: Sunnyvale, CA / Boulder, CO / New York, NY
finalists.summary: VP of Engineering for Workspace Drive — leads org responsible for product serving 2B+ users globally. Drive is evolving from storage solution into an AI-powered repository for the future of work. Required: leading globally-dispersed eng teams of 300+, 3+ yrs deploying GenAI in consumer products. Preferred: Agentic AI workflows, RAG architectures at petabyte scale.

finalists.title: Senior Director, Engineering, Geo Maker
finalists.salary: Google Senior Director band (~$370-550K base + bonus + equity per Glassdoor)
finalists.summary: Leads engineering team building Google Maps Platform, Google Earth, and Analytics on BigQuery. Drives strategy and execution for GenAI-forward solutions across Geo (Consumer, Auto, RWM, RWJ, Ads, GR, GDM, Cloud). Inspires and grows team of engineering leaders. Required: 15+ yrs eng leadership, 5+ yrs technical management.

finalists.title: Senior Director, Engineering, Ecosystem Growth
finalists.location: Sunnyvale, CA / Kirkland, WA / Tel Aviv (preferred locations)
finalists.salary: Google Senior Director band (~$370-550K base + bonus + equity per Glassdoor)
finalists.summary: Senior Engineering Director leading large-scale full-stack communication infrastructure plus people/sharing infrastructure. Owns growth-oriented cross-product user experiences and data-oriented decision making. Multi-geo eng org; technical vision for Sharing & Connection, Ecosystem Journeys, and Growth across Google's user-facing products. Required: 10+ yrs eng leadership, mobile/distributed systems experience.
